alignmentNotes: Case Issued is a system event that triggers post-payment; hearing centre allocation exists in CASE_ISSUED state
Explicit caseworker event exists for manual hearing centre assignment
Event exists across multiple states; paper channel variants also available
Response and counterclaim are modelled as separate events in the event model, not a single combined event. The WA task treats them as one action
Counterclaim events exist on Sheet 2 but there is no single 'Submit Counterclaim' event. The counterclaim lifecycle is modelled separately from main claim
Make an application is a generic event. The event model does not distinguish adjournment, set-aside, or other gen app types as separate events
Same issue as adjournment; no sub-typed gen app events in the model for set-aside orders
Generic catch-all general application maps directly to Make an application

Upload your documents exists but is not sub-typed by claim vs counterclaim vs gen app. Note: citizen uploads only -- WA tasks for further evidence are only created when documents are uploaded by citizens via the citizen dashboard

Upload your documents is not sub-typed by document context. Note: citizen uploads only -- WA tasks for further evidence are only created when documents are uploaded by citizens via the citizen dashboard

Upload your documents is not sub-typed by document context for gen app. Note: citizen uploads only -- WA tasks for further evidence are only created when documents are uploaded by citizens via the citizen dashboard

Upload your documents is not sub-typed by document context for counterclaim. Note: citizen uploads only -- WA tasks for further evidence are only created when documents are uploaded by citizens via the citizen dashboard
Events exist; WA task triggers on the professional-user variant
Specific case flag type (Welsh Language); event model supports it via case flags events
Dedicated HMCTS-only event exists in the model across nearly all states
Multiple order events exist but the judicial order workflow (Make/Draft/Amend/Seal/Notify order) is still marked as 'to be determined' in the event model
No 'Failed Payment' event exists in the event model. Payment is implied in Submit and Pay / Case Issued flow but failure handling is not modelled. A new event is needed
